attempts:
induction n as [|n IH]; intros k LT.
- exfalso; exact (Nat.nlt_0_r k LT).
- destruct (Henkin_exists (S (S n))) as [[thetas cs] Henk]. destruct Henk as [|? thetas' cs' p c Henk' Hmax Hfresh_head Hfresh_tail];
      simpl in *; unfold nth_Henkin_constant; simpl; [discriminate|]. apply (last_HC_for_finite_formulae (V.to_list thetas') c).
-- apply (nth_error_In (nth_Henkin_axiom k) (V.to_list thetas')). rewrite <- nth_error_tl, V.tl_to_list. replace (S ((S (S n)) - S k - 1)) with ((S (S n)) - S k) by omega. apply (proj1 (Henkin_seq k (S (S n))
                     (fst (proj1_sig (Henkin_exists (S k)))) thetas
                     (snd (proj1_sig (Henkin_exists (S k)))) cs
                     (le_S _ _ (Nat.succ_le_succ (proj1 (Nat.lt_succ_r k n) LT)))
                     (proj2_sig (Henkin_exists (S k))) Henk)).
-- exact Hmax.
